---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**What skill would you like to see?**
Describe the skill's purpose.

**Why is this useful?**
How would this help you or the community?

**Suggested approach**
Any ideas on how to implement it?

**Are you willing to contribute?**
Let us know if you'd like to help build it!
